data.name: Boob Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Boob Simulator is a lighthearted NSFW sandbox focused on visual fantasy, customization, and motion.

There’s no story, no objectives, and nothing to grind. You simply pick a look, set the mood, and enjoy watching different fantasies come to life. The experience is meant to be relaxed, playful, and easy to jump into.

Choose from different body sizes, skin tones, tops, hairstyles, poses, and background colors. Subtle camera movement and jiggle physics on the boobs keep everything feeling alive and natural as you explore different visual styles. From soft and calm to bold and eye-catching.

Boob Simulator is a novelty experience. It’s something you can enjoy for a few minutes or let run while you experiment with different looks and vibes.

Features

  • Jiggle physics on the boobs for natural, continuous motion

  • Multiple body size options and visual styles

  • Skin tone, top, hair, and color customization

  • Several poses to view from different angles

  • Adjustable lighting, background colors, and music

  • Mouse-controlled camera for smooth, natural viewing

  • Simple, relaxed, and easy to enjoy

No goals. No pressure. Just fantasy, variety, and vibes.

data.short_description: Boob Simulator is a lighthearted adult sandbox focused on visual fantasy, customization, and natural motion. Choose different looks, poses, lighting, and vibes while enjoying a relaxed, non-explicit viewing experience designed purely for casual enjoyment.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 960 / AMD RX 470
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound device
